partiallyFulfills.VAL-QUOTA-011: API contract returns 402 with upgrade_url; widget-side generic messaging is UI work deferred to M8 hardening or a dedicated widget-degradation feature. The server contract that the widget consumes is fully specified.

whatWasImplemented: src/app/api/chat/session/route.ts — quota gate inserted between the rate-limit check and the OpenAI embed() call. Order matters: we resolve owner plan, call increment_message_counter RPC, check ok, and return 402 BEFORE any inference cost is incurred.

resolveOwnerMessageLimit() helper — reads profiles.plan_id -> plans.monthly_message_limit, falls back to 2000 (Starter cap) when the owner has no plan. The fallback prevents unlimited LLM calls on trial-signup accounts.
402 response shape: {error:'quota_exceeded', upgrade_url:'/dashboard/billing', used, limit}. Widget consumers can read used/limit for richer messaging without calling a separate endpoint.

src/__tests__/message-quota.test.ts — 5 unit tests: RPC invoked with correct owner+limit (VAL-QUOTA-001), 402 + no embed() call when ok=false (VAL-QUOTA-002), Starter fallback for null plan_id, 500 on RPC error (distinguishes infra failure from quota denial), trialing owner still burns a message.

Concurrency (VAL-QUOTA-003): race-safety is proven at the RPC layer by M3F1's 20-parallel test. The route is a thin wrapper — if 20 concurrent HTTP requests arrive at budget=10, each one calls the atomic RPC, the RPC returns exactly 10 oks, the route maps them to 10x200 and 10x402.

Idempotency of invoice.paid reset (VAL-QUOTA-010): handled by M2F3's processed_stripe_events gate — duplicate deliveries short-circuit without re-running the reset handler. M3F4 extends that handler with the usage_counters UPDATE and inherits the idempotency.
discoveredIssues: chat-session.test.ts's legacy 'success' mock setup needed a quota-ok mockResolvedValue between the site lookup and match_chunks call, plus a profile lookup for plan_id. Updated the test in this feature so it reflects the new route flow.

verification.testsRun: pnpm vitest run — 309 passed / 1 skipped / 42 files (+5 new, 0 regressions after updating the chat-session 'success' fixture).

manualChecks.expected: route returns 402 with upgrade_url, no embed call
manualChecks.observed: pass via unit test with embed() spy

filesChanged: src/__tests__/chat-session.test.ts (modified — fixture update for quota path)
